title: Delhi High Court issues notice to CBI, CAG, Centre on plea by Lieutenant Colonel alleging corruption in Indian Army
description: The Delhi High Court recently issued notice to the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI), the Central government and the Comptroller and Auditor General of India (CAG) on a plea filed by an army officer seeking a probe into the allegations of corruption in the Indian Army. Justice Prateek Jalan asked the authorities to file their responses within four weeks and posted the case for further consideration on May 19. Justice Prateek JalanThe Court was hearing a plea by Lieutenant Colonel Sumit
